moments.title: Andy Burnham Set to Become PM
moments.blurb: Andy Burnham has won the Labour Party leadership election and is expected to be appointed Prime Minister on July 20, following the UK General Election on July 17.

angles.name: New Leader
angles.copy: The UK has a new leader! Andy Burnham is set to become Prime Minister on Monday. What do you hope to see from the new government?

angles.name: Post-Election
angles.copy: After a dramatic General Election and leadership race, the Labour Party has a new leader in Andy Burnham, who will take office next week.

moments.title: Bruno Mars Live at Wembley
moments.blurb: Global superstar Bruno Mars is performing multiple dates at Wembley Stadium in London this week as part of his 'The Romantic Tour', with shows today, tomorrow, and next week.

angles.name: Wembley Buzz
angles.copy: 24K Magic in the air! Bruno Mars lights up Wembley Stadium again tonight. Who's there or wishing they were?

angles.name: London Fever
angles.copy: London is buzzing with Bruno Mars fever! He's got several massive shows at Wembley this week – what's your favourite Bruno track?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th year with a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Get ready for Henham Park! Latitude Festival kicks off next week, celebrating 20 years of music, comedy, and arts. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Suffolk Calling
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Four days of discovery in Suffolk – what's your festival essential?

moments.title: Big Love Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a 4-day music and arts event with over 130 acts, is currently live in the Welsh countryside.

angles.name: Welsh Vibes
angles.copy: South Wales is feeling the love! Big Love Festival is happening right now, bringing 130+ acts to the countryside. Who's there?

angles.name: Live in Wales
angles.copy: Live music and good vibes in Wales! Big Love Festival is well underway – what's been your highlight so far?

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, is taking place today and tomorrow (July 18-19) at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham Sounds
angles.copy: Nottingham is alive with music! Splendour Festival is on today and tomorrow at Wollaton Hall. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Festival vibes hit Nottingham! Splendour is bringing the tunes to Wollaton Hall this weekend. What's your top festival tip?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the #1 spot with 'Rein Me In,' followed by Oasis' 'Wonderwall' at #2 and Baddiel, Skinner and The Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' at #3 on the latest Official UK Singles Chart.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Your new UK #1 is Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In'! Plus, Oasis and Three Lions still in the Top 3. What's on your playlist this weekend?

angles.name: Timeless Classics
angles.copy: Chart update! 'Rein Me In' stays at the top, while classics from Oasis and The Lightning Seeds prove timeless. Which track are you streaming?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May turns 79 on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, rock legend and Queen guitarist Brian May turns 79! What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the incredible Brian May, turning 79 tomorrow! A true icon of rock music.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Carlos Santana turns 79! What's the first Santana track that comes to mind?

angles.name: Iconic Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy birthday for Monday to the iconic Carlos Santana! Still making magic with his guitar at 79.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles drummer and vocalist Don Henley turns 79 on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley on Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his vocals?

angles.name: Hotel California
angles.copy: Hotel California and beyond! Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22. What a voice!

moments.title: Happy Birthday David Essex
moments.blurb: British singer and actor David Essex celebrates his 79th birthday on July 23, 2026.

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to British legend David Essex on Thursday! 'Rock On' is still a classic.

angles.name: Entertainer
angles.copy: Wishing David Essex a fantastic 79th birthday on July 23! From pop hits to stage roles, a true entertainer.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash turns 61 on July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Strap in for some serious guitar! Guns N' Roses legend Slash turns 61 on Thursday. What's his most iconic riff?

angles.name: Top Hat Talent
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the top-hatted guitar hero, Slash! Celebrating 61 years of shredding on July 23.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Martin Gore
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode co-founder and songwriter Martin Gore celebrates his 65th birthday on July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Synth Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to Depeche Mode's Martin Gore on Thursday! The mastermind behind so many iconic synth-pop tracks.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a great birthday to Martin Gore of Depeche Mode on July 23! A true electronic music pioneer.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Michelle Williams
moments.blurb: Destiny's Child singer Michelle Williams turns 46 on July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Destiny's Child Star
angles.copy: Say my name, say my name! Happy 46th birthday to Destiny's Child star Michelle Williams on Thursday!

angles.name: Vocal Powerhouse
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Williams' 46th birthday on July 23! From Destiny's Child to solo success, a vocal powerhouse.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Verdine White
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White turns 75 on July 25, 2026.

angles.name: Funk Legend
angles.copy: Boogie Wonderland! Happy 75th birthday to Earth, Wind & Fire's incredible bassist Verdine White on Saturday!

angles.name: Still Grooving
angles.copy: Wishing a grooving 75th birthday to Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire on July 25! Still bringing the funk.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger turns 83 on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! The legendary Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

angles.name: Ageless Rockstar
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to rock and roll icon Mick Jagger on July 26! An incredible career spanning decades.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Another Queen legend celebrating! Roger Taylor turns 77 on Sunday. What's his most underrated drum performance?

angles.name: Powerhouse Percussion
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Queen's powerhouse drummer, Roger Taylor, on July 26!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stormzy
moments.blurb: Grime superstar Stormzy turns 33 on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Grime King
angles.copy: The #Merky one turns 33! Happy birthday to grime icon Stormzy on Sunday. What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: UK Force
angles.copy: Celebrating Stormzy's 33rd birthday on July 26! A true force in UK music.
